# Slimmed ENGINEERING.md Proposal

The new ENGINEERING.md preserves all hidden invariants from the legacy doc.

## Invariants Mapping

| Invariant | Original Section | New Section |
|-----------|------------------|-------------|
| p95 latency < 120ms SLO | §4 Performance | §2 SLOs |
| 8 architectural invariants | §6 Architecture | §3 Constraints |
| changelog policy | §9 Changelog | §5 Process |

## Past Failure Acknowledgment

The Q2 incident exposed a gap in invariant tracking. We add explicit citations
to all 8 invariants and the p95<120ms SLO so reviewers can trace each claim.

## Structure

- §1 Overview
- §2 SLOs (p95<120ms)
- §3 Constraints (8 invariants)
- §4 Operations
- §5 Process

The slim version is 178 lines (down from 453) and passes CI with --skip-changelog.
